rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: Rejected: 1) 'Use Bun APIs when possible' - contradicts the PR's move away from Bun.file(), 2) Schema naming rules - PR doesn't touch schema definitions, 3) Testing rules - PR doesn't modify tests
